claim: The primary modelling corpus contains 75,123 documents.
caveat: Two primary documents remain in corpus denominators but produce zero TF-IDF vectors under P1.

claim: The selected NMF model contains 75,121 modelled documents.
The primary corpus contains 34,060 retained source turns.
The temporal analysis contains 243 legislative-debate sessions.
The primary modelling corpus contains approximately 15.9 million words.
Only two P1 primary documents are excluded as zero TF-IDF rows.
caveat: The excluded documents remain part of corpus denominator reporting but receive no modelled topic vector.

claim: The K=12 P1 model did not converge within 400 iterations.
caveat: The remaining candidate models converged under the configured maximum iteration count.

claim: K=24 has the highest mean NPMI among converged P1 grid models.
K=24 has the highest top-10 topic diversity among converged P1 models.
K=24 has the highest mean exclusivity among converged P1 models.
P1 improves mean NPMI relative to P0 at K=24.
caveat: P0 and P1 are separately fitted feature spaces; this is a preprocessing sensitivity comparison, not a one-to-one topic-alignment test.

claim: P1 improves top-10 topic diversity relative to P0.
P1 improves mean topic exclusivity relative to P0.
P1 increases mean redundancy only slightly relative to P0.
caveat: The small redundancy increase is outweighed by larger improvements in coherence, diversity and exclusivity.

claim: Selected-model prevalence reproduces grid prevalence to within 0.00001888.
caveat: This validates that the selected-model transform is consistent with the original fitted-grid prevalence.

claim: Justice and judicial discourse reaches its maximum in 2013.
representative_document_excerpt: fallo de la corte preconiza que se mantengan los pactos de silencio. esto es un escándalo.
caveat: Representative documents validate the topic identity but do not establish the cause of the 2013 peak.

claim: Rights, gender and reproductive-health discourse reaches its maximum in 2018.
representative_document_excerpt: que las hogueras ya no pueden quemarnos. hemos aprendido a pelear por nuestros derechos y no nos van a detener con nada, ni con botas ni con itacas. reitero nuestra solidaridad para con esas mujeres mendocinas que fueron agredidas.
caveat: The component is broader than abortion and also contains women's rights, human rights, health, gender and violence.

claim: Rights, gender and reproductive-health discourse rises again in 2020.
representative_document_excerpt: tenemos que abrazar la cultura de la paz, de los derechos humanos, pero, fundamentalmente, de la libertad de las personas, de la identidad y de una vida libre de violencia.

claim: Budget, public-expenditure and inflation discourse reaches its maximum in 2021.
representative_document_excerpt: en ese punto me quiero detener, porque analizando cuál ha sido la participación de nuestra provincia en valores relativos sobre el total del presupuesto de la administración pública nacional, concluimos que en el año 2008 misiones recibe aproximadamente 1.400 millones de pesos, e…
caveat: Representative documents validate the topic identity but do not establish the cause of the 2021 peak.

claim: Tax and fiscal-policy discourse reaches its maximum in 2021.
representative_document_excerpt: señor presidente: el impuesto sobre los bienes personales no debería existir. no debería existir, porque implica una doble imposición, porque ya los flujos necesarios para comprar los bienes personales pagaron el impuesto a las ganancias previamente. los bienes personales no naci…
caveat: The topic includes income tax, personal-assets tax, thresholds, internal taxes and broader fiscal policy.

claim: Tax discourse remains elevated through 2022 and 2023.
representative_document_excerpt: a fin de que quienes están en zonas desfavorables dejen de pagar el impuesto a las ganancias.

claim: Pension and social-security discourse rises from 3.20% to 5.51% between the first and final periods.
representative_document_excerpt: ni con el estado ni con el sistema previsional.
caveat: The period-level increase is more robust than selecting one exact annual maximum.

claim: Questions of privilege approximately double between the first and final periods.
caveat: This is a parliamentary-procedure finding, not a public-policy agenda.

claim: The 2013 justice peak is preserved under document, source-turn and session weighting.
caveat: Magnitudes differ because the weighting units differ; the peak-year interpretation is unchanged.

claim: The 2018 rights and reproductive-health peak is preserved under all three weighting schemes.
The 2021 budget peak is preserved under all three weighting schemes.
caveat: Only eight modelled sessions are present in 2021. The peak remains consistent.

claim: The 2021 tax peak is preserved under all three weighting schemes.
caveat: Only eight modelled sessions are present in 2021. The peak remains consistent.

claim: Full-context BERTopic benchmark result.
caveat: This row may affect only the model-comparison section. It may not reopen the selected NMF model or temporal findings.
